name: Chili Relleno Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the green chilies open and line a 13" x 9" baking dish with them.
2. Layer the cheeses evenly over the chilies.
3. Add any remaining chilies over the cheese layer.
4. Mix the whole wheat flour with a small amount of milk to form a smooth paste using a wire whisk.
5. Mix in the remaining milk and sour cream. Beat in the eggs, one at a time, then add the diced meat.
6. Pour the mixture over the chilies and cheese.
7. Bake for 30 minutes at 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
8. Pour salsa over top and bake an additional 15 minutes.
